description: This file implements the business logic service for managing loan application drafts in a Spring Boot application. It handles creating, retrieving, updating, patching, running decisioning, checking readiness, submitting, and deleting draft loan applications, including JSON data manipulation, validation, and interactions with repositories and other services.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftService
classes.description: Service class providing business logic for managing loan application drafts, including CRUD operations, partial updates, decisioning, and submission workflows with JSON data handling and validation.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan draft for the specified user, initializing with provided data and section status, saving via repository, and returning a response DTO.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft owned by the user by ID, throwing if not found.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts for the user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Performs a full update on an existing draft, replacing data and optionally section status and current step, with optimistic locking.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within a draft by merging new section data and status.

methods.name: runDecisioning
methods.description: Computes and saves a risk score and decision for the draft, updating its status accordingly.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Checks if the draft is ready to submit based on required sections and document types, returning missing items if not.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the draft, performing readiness checks, optionally running decisioning, marking as submitted, and sending notifications.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes the draft if not already submitted, owned by the user.
